mapper.insert:
SELECT QUIZ_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO QUIZ ( QUIZ_ID, COURSE_ID, CHAPTER_ID, QUESTION_TYPE, QUESTION_TEXT, ANSWER_TEXT, EXPLANATION, DIFFICULTY, STATUS, AI_GENERATED_YN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{quizId}, #{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{questionType}, #{questionText}, #{answerText}, #{explanation}, #{difficulty}, #{status}, #{aiGeneratedYn}, SYSDATE )

SELECT QUIZ_OPTION_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO QUIZ_OPTION ( OPTION_ID, QUIZ_ID, OPTION_NO, OPTION_TEXT, CORRECT_YN ) VALUES ( #{optionId}, #{quizId}, #{optionNo}, #{optionText}, #{correctYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT QUIZ_ID AS quizId, COURSE_ID AS courseId, CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, QUESTION_TYPE AS questionType, QUESTION_TEXT AS questionText, ANSWER_TEXT AS answerText, EXPLANATION AS explanation, DIFFICULTY AS difficulty, STATUS AS status, AI_GENERATED_YN AS aiGeneratedYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM QUIZ WHERE QUIZ_ID = #{quizId}

SELECT QUIZ_ID AS quizId, COURSE_ID AS courseId, CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, QUESTION_TYPE AS questionType, QUESTION_TEXT AS questionText, ANSWER_TEXT AS answerText, EXPLANATION AS explanation, DIFFICULTY AS difficulty, STATUS AS status, AI_GENERATED_YN AS aiGeneratedYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM QUIZ WHERE CHAPTER_ID = #{chapterId} ORDER BY QUIZ_ID

SELECT QUIZ_ID AS quizId, COURSE_ID AS courseId, CHAPTER_ID AS chapterId, QUESTION_TYPE AS questionType, QUESTION_TEXT AS questionText, ANSWER_TEXT AS answerText, EXPLANATION AS explanation, DIFFICULTY AS difficulty, STATUS AS status, AI_GENERATED_YN AS aiGeneratedYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM QUIZ WHERE COURSE_ID = #{courseId} ORDER BY QUIZ_ID
SELECT OPTION_ID AS optionId, QUIZ_ID AS quizId, OPTION_NO AS optionNo, OPTION_TEXT AS optionText, CORRECT_YN AS correctYn FROM QUIZ_OPTION WHERE QUIZ_ID = #{quizId} ORDER BY OPTION_NO
